title: senecio clivicola var. pampae
intro: Senecio clivicola var. pampae, also known as a variety of the Chilean burnet-sage, is a plant species within the daisy family that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds with potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio clivicola var. pampae include its use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared through infusions or decoctions to make teas and infusions for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of applications and efficacy.
